etfs.name: Vanguard S&P 500
etfs.desc: Tracks S&P 500. Best core holding for most investors. Near-zero cost.

etfs.name: Vanguard Total US Market
etfs.desc: Covers entire US market including small & mid caps. 3,700+ stocks.

etfs.name: Invesco Nasdaq-100
etfs.desc: Top 100 Nasdaq companies. Heavy tech/AI. Higher growth, higher risk.

etfs.name: Vanguard Total World
etfs.desc: Global diversification. 10,000+ stocks across all countries.

etfs.name: Vanguard Info Technology
etfs.desc: Pure technology exposure. Apple, Microsoft, Nvidia. Strong AI play.

etfs.name: Vanguard Growth
etfs.desc: Large-cap US growth stocks. Lower cost alternative to QQQ.

etfs.name: Schwab US Dividend Equity
etfs.desc: Quality dividend payers screened for financial strength. Yield ~3-4%.

etfs.name: Vanguard High Dividend Yield
etfs.desc: ~400 high-yield US stocks. Pairs well with SCHD for income.

etfs.name: iShares Core US Bond
etfs.desc: US investment-grade bonds. Reduces portfolio volatility. Yield ~4-5%.

etfs.name: SPDR Gold Shares
etfs.desc: Physical gold exposure. Hedge against inflation and currency risk.

etfs.name: iShares Gold Trust
etfs.desc: Same as GLD but cheaper. +41% return in past year. Lower cost gold.

etfs.name: Global X AI & Robotics
etfs.desc: AI, robotics, and automation companies. High growth, high volatility.

etfs.name: iShares Bitcoin Trust
etfs.desc: Direct Bitcoin exposure. $70B+ AUM. High risk, high potential return.
